What I help with

Come to me with the thing nobody could explain

These are the reasons people arrive. Every one has a programme behind it.

Sleep that won't come

Wired at midnight, exhausted at seven.

Fatigue with no cause

Bloods normal, energy gone.

Pain that keeps returning

Old injuries, fascia, stubborn joints.

Anxiety & overwhelm

A nervous system stuck switched on.

Hormones & cycles

Perimenopause, PMS, the whole rhythm.

Long-tail viral load

The tiredness that outlasted the illness.

★★★★★
I'd spent four years being told my bloods were normal. Jaz was the first person who looked at the whole system instead of one number.

Rachel M. · Birmingham

Work with me

Hello — I'm Jaz

I trained first as an engineer, so I have spent most of my life thinking in waveforms and tolerances. Then I turned that on the body.

Fifteen years on, I work where those two worlds meet — measurable frequency therapy on one side, information-field work and Kundalini on the other. Most people find me after they have already tried the obvious things.

  • BEng
  • Nutritional therapist
  • FSM practitioner
  • Clinical hypnotherapist
  • Kundalini teacher
  • TimeWaver Pro
With love, Jaz

TimeWaver Packs

Frequency programmes, as a package

Built for you remotely, then sent to your device. Buy once — or let me hold the whole year for you.

Single Programme

£35

  • One programme, yours to keep
  • Sent by code, same day
  • Written guide — when and how long
  • Works on any Healy edition

The Year Pack

£140 / year

  • All 200+ programmes, unlimited
  • Every new programme I add
  • Quarterly group healing included
  • 15% off any one-to-one
  • Cancel any time before renewal
Take the year

  • Written report, in plain English

Deta Elis

Scan · Remedies · Education

A bioresonance scan reads what your body is carrying — then we match it with the right remedies, and I teach you how to run them yourself.

1 · The scan

Remote or in clinic — a full read of the field.

2 · Your remedies

Shipped to you, with a schedule that makes sense.

3 · Learn it yourself

Short trainings so you are not dependent on me.

From the journal

Understand what is actually going on

Short, plain-English reads on how the body holds stress — and what you can do about it.

Featured article

Why stress shows up in your stomach

Chronic stress slows digestion, raises inflammation and thins the gut lining — which is why so many people arrive with gut symptoms and a clear blood test. Here are five ways to break that cycle.

Read the article
